meta.title: WillChain – Your Digital Will on the Blockchain
meta.description: WillChain is an automated digital will on the blockchain. Your crypto assets will automatically transfer to your heir without lawyers or notaries.
meta.og_title: WillChain – Your Digital Will on the Blockchain
meta.og_description: Your crypto assets will automatically transfer to your heir. No lawyers. No bureaucracy. Forever on the blockchain.

hero.title: When You're Gone – Your Assets Go to Your Chosen Heir
hero.subtitle: Every year, thousands of people pass away without leaving a successor for their cryptocurrency. Loved ones know the funds exist but can't access them. WillChain solves this automatically.

problem.label: The Problem
problem.title: What Happens to Your Crypto When You're No Longer Here?
problem.subtitle: Most people don't think about it until it's too late.
problem.card1_desc: If only you know the private key, your funds disappear forever upon your passing. No court or notary can help here.
problem.card2_desc: Billions of dollars in cryptocurrency sit untouched in abandoned wallets. Their owners are gone, and the funds are locked forever – inaccessible to anyone.
problem.card3_desc: Even knowing the funds exist, without the key or password, family members cannot access them. It's a legal dead end.

dashboard.smart_wallet_warning: ⚠️ Smart Wallet (MultiSig/Safe) detected. Automatic timer reset upon DApp interaction is limited. For reliability, manually click 'I'm Here!' before each scheduled deadline.

dashboard.dividends_hint: Accrued from funds recovered from abandoned wallets.

dashboard.activate_no_balance: WILL tokens are required for activation. Get them via the bot above.

recycle.label: Recycle Funds
recycle.hint: If a wallet owner has completely disappeared (no activity beyond the set period + 60 days) and no heir was designated – anyone can initiate fund recycling and receive a 1% reward.
recycle.status_inactive: Inactive – Not Yet Abandoned (Total timeout not reached)

telegram.link_modal_hint: Sign a message with your wallet to confirm ownership. The signature will be automatically sent to the bot.
telegram.link_modal_success: ✅ Wallet Linked! Return to the Telegram bot.

how_it_works.label: 4 Steps
how_it_works.subtitle: Four simple steps – and your crypto is protected
how_it_works.title: How it Works
how_it_works.step1_desc: Buy WILL tokens on an exchange or receive them from another owner. Your digital will activates as soon as you hold any amount of WILL.
how_it_works.step2_desc: Specify the wallet address of the person who should receive your funds after your prolonged inactivity or passing. This could be your spouse, child, friend – anyone you care about.
how_it_works.step3_desc: Any outgoing transaction automatically confirms your activity. If your wallet hasn't been used for a while, click 'I'm Here!' manually.
how_it_works.step4_desc: Set how long of inactivity triggers the WillChain mechanism: 30, 90, 180, or 365 days. This is followed by a 30-day grace period and 30 days for the heir.

trust.noncustodial_desc: No one but your heir gets your funds

faq.label: FAQ
faq.subtitle: Answers to the most common questions
faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.q1: Do I need to log in daily?
faq.a1: No. If you regularly use your crypto wallet, the timer resets automatically. The 'I'm Here!' button is only needed if your wallet is completely unused.
faq.a2: 30, 90, 180, or 365 days. You can change this anytime. Frequent traders choose 30 days, while long-term investors opt for 365.
faq.q3: What happens if the period expires?
faq.a3: A 30-day grace period begins – you can still confirm your presence. Then, the heir has 30 days to initiate a claim. If no heir is designated or they don't claim in time, funds are recycled: 47% are burned forever, 47% are distributed to WILL holders, 5% go to the protocol, and 1% to the initiator.
faq.q4: Can someone change my heir without my knowledge?
faq.a4: No. Only you – with your private key – can change the heir. The contract guarantees this.
faq.q5: Does anyone see my personal data?
faq.a5: No. The blockchain only stores your wallet address, balance, and activity timestamps. No names or personal information.
faq.q6: Where is the smart contract located?
faq.a6: Deployed on the Base Sepolia testnet. The source code is open and verified on Basescan.
faq.q7: Does the auto-timer reset work with multi-sig wallets?
faq.a7: If you use a standard wallet (MetaMask, Trust Wallet), the timer resets with any transfer. However, if you use Smart Wallets or Multisig (like Safe), where a relayer executes transactions, you need to manually confirm your activity via the website button.
faq.q8: Can a DEX or dApp approval affect my inheritance?
faq.a8: No. Token allowances (approvals) do not affect your inheritance timer. Only your direct actions – sending tokens, calling confirmActivity(), or setting up vault data – count as activity confirmations. A third party using transferFrom() cannot reset your timer. Your inheritance will still work even with active DEX approvals.

security.allowance_text: Only your direct actions count as activity confirmation: sending tokens, confirming activity, or setting vault data. DEX swaps via allowances do not reset the timer. If you trade on a DEX, remember to confirm your activity separately.

disclaimer.title: Legal Information
disclaimer.modal_subtitle: Please read before connecting your wallet
disclaimer.s1_text: The WILL token is a utility token solely for managing digital inheritance within WillChain. Holding the token does not grant rights to profits, company shares, or any rights associated with securities.
disclaimer.s2_text: The token burning mechanism is a technical tool to clear the network of inactive participants, not a promise of market value growth. We do not guarantee liquidity or future asset prices.
disclaimer.s3_text: The user is fully responsible for maintaining activity or performing manual confirmation before the set deadline expires. Loss of access to private keys or missing the deadline will result in irreversible loss of access to funds.
disclaimer.s4_text: The protocol is deployed on Base (Ethereum L2). You agree to the risks associated with smart contract vulnerabilities or blockchain network updates. This is experimental software – use at your own risk.
disclaimer.s5_text: The user is obliged to independently verify that the use of WillChain does not violate the laws of their jurisdiction.
disclaimer.checkbox: I have read and accept the terms. I understand that I am fully responsible for my activity and potential loss of assets.
